creator: jgh@FreeBSD.org
text:
Packages and Ports yield same error. Unable to play game. I wish I knew more about this error so I could help resolve it.

-jgh

[helfman@its-helfman03 ~/workspace/ports/games/2048-qt]$ 2048-qt
